The powder was sedimented from ethanol on a 0.1 mm
thick aluminium backing and covered with 0.01 mm
thick Al foil for protection. This way sediment
layers could be obtained, each with enriched Se
isotope content of 2.9 to 28.9 mg/cm2. The diameter
of the deposited layer was either 7 or 10 mm.
